subcodes.first_line: Iran is laid waste, and until justice and equity become its foundation and bedrock, its condition shall worsen day by day. The transgressions against his honor Foroughi [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ايران هنوز ويرانست و تا عدل و داد بنيان و بنياد نگردد روز بروز بدتر شود. تعدّيات بر حضرت فروغی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
